summary: Possible accessibility barriers found on the RNIB website, including generic link text and missing image alt text

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some links may have generic text that does not explain their destination or action
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have cognitive disabilities may have difficulty understanding the purpose of these links
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Generic link text found in HTML code

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may be missing alt text, which could make it difficult for users to understand their content
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to access the information conveyed by these images
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Missing alt text found in HTML code

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some content may not reflow properly when the viewport is narrowed, potentially causing issues for users with low vision
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on zooming or have low vision may have difficulty accessing content that does not reflow properly
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Fixed or wide content found in low-vision findings

outreach_notes: The RNIB website may have some accessibility barriers that could be improved to make it more usable for users with disabilities. We suggest reviewing the website's link text, image alt text, and content reflow to ensure that they are accessible to all users.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
